items.name: credit_risk_default_prediction
items.description: A modular machine learning pipeline to predict the Probability of Default for loan applicants. Uses a "Champion-Challenger" framework to evaluate and compare multiple statistical and machine learning models (including regulatory explainability).

items.name: Feature-Engineering-Framework-For-Traffic-Accident-Prediction-using-XAI
items.description: 🚦 Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

items.name: awesome-QAI-Papers-QML
items.description: 📚 Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.

items.name: tensorflow

items.name: zerfoo
items.description: Pure Go machine learning framework. Train, run, and serve ML models with go build. Zero CGo.

items.name: Python-for-Machine-Learning-A-Frameworks-Libraries-Guide
items.description: This repository provides a practical exploration of the essential Python frameworks and libraries for Machine Learning. It includes curated examples, code snippets, and mini-projects to demonstrate the power and application of tools like Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, Numpy, Pandas, Seaborn, Matplotlib..

items.name: pontos
items.description: 🛠️ Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

items.name: Ignis
items.description: 🔥 Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

items.name: house-price-app
items.description: This project is a machine learning-based web application that predicts house prices based on various input features. The model is built using Linear Regression and deployed using a web framework to provide real-time predictions.

items.name: INNOVATIONS-IN-STROKE-IDENTIFICATION-A-MACHINE-LEARNING-BASED-DIAGNOSTIC-MODEL-USING-NEUROIMAGES
items.description: A machine learning framework designed to enhance the speed and accuracy of stroke identification. This model leverages deep learning architectures to analyze neuroimaging data (MRI/CT), assisting in the rapid diagnosis and classification of ischemic and hemorrhagic strokes.

items.name: Triangle-AI
items.description: Triangle AI is a distributed machine learning framework for detecting file-based malware (PDF, SWF, Doc, Html).

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: ML-Selective-Image-Encryption
items.description: IOP Published Research | A Machine Learning-driven selective image encryption framework combining SVM-based ROI detection with chaos (Henon, CLS) and DNA encoding for high security and reduced computational complexity.

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: OpenPQD-Synthetic-Power-Quality-Dataset-Analysis-Toolkit-for-ML
items.description: An open-source dataset of synthetic power quality disturbances (PQD), ideal for training and validating machine learning models. Signals are generated using established mathematical models from scientific literature, with parameter ranges conforming to the IEEE 1159 standard. Includes a Python analysis framework for statistical exploration.

items.name: Semiconductor-Wafer-Defect-Analysis--A-Machine-Learning-Framework
items.description: 9‑class wafer defect classification + per‑class anomaly detection. EfficientNetV2 with coordinate channels, two‑phase training, ONNX + ONNX Runtime verification (max diff < 1e‑4), PCA + Isolation Forest, SQLite storage.

items.name: vibrolearn
items.description: A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

items.name: warp
items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: ML_Algorithms_From_Scratch
items.description: A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: ML-From-Scratch
items.description: End-to-end Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using only Python and NumPy. Focused on understanding the underlying mathematics and linear algebra without high-level frameworks.

items.description: This project delivers a complete, end-to-end churn intelligence system from raw CSV files to an interactive Power BI dashboard and a machine learning prediction model, using a SQL first, analytics engineering approach.

The pipeline features robust data preprocessing to handle class imbalance and evaluates five supervised classification models to identify key health predictors.

items.description: A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.description: An analysis framework for detecting market regime shifts in global energy commodities sector (2000–2024). This project applies advanced statistical methods and machine learning to uncover hidden patterns in crude oil, Brent crude, natural gas, heating oil, and RBOB gasoline prices, with practical applications for risk management and forecasting.

items.name: battery-assessment-and-RUL
items.description: This project presents a machine learning framework to estimate battery health and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in devices like laptops and smartphones. Using user inputs, data preprocessing, and regression models, it predicts degradation trends and generates reports with maintenance insights and alerts

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: fucking-awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars⭐ and forks🍴

items.name: PhaseForge
items.description: PhaseForge is a framework for high-throughput alloy phase diagram prediction using machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) integrated with ATAT and CALPHAD modeling. Includes tools for structure relaxation, molecular dynamics, and TDB generation.

items.name: AD-Microbiome-ML-Classification
items.description: This project proposes a computational, data-driven diagnostic framework for Alzheimer’s disease (AD) by integrating microbiome-derived genome-scale metabolic models (GEMs) and machine learning to accurately predict disease stages from gut microbial activity.

items.name: Realtime-weather-forecasting

It utilizes a machine learning approach to build predictive models for key risk components, providing a data-driven solution for risk management.

The resulting files are optimized for subsequent analysis, particularly for training machine learning models. The framework is configured to handle AK15 jets with condor

items.description: This project proposes a novel Ensemble learning–based framework for predicting anti-inflammatory small molecules, aiming to improve predictive accuracy and generalization over existing machine learning approaches.

items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.
